summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open pull requests. No GitHub mutations are planned because close/comment/label actions are blocked and merge preflight lacks Codex /review proof for every PR. #92584 is routed to central security handling because its hydrated body describes token-in-query secret exposure. #92654 is blocked for human or repair-run follow-up because checks fail and review-bot findings were not hydrated, so no complete executable fix artifact is safe from the provided artifacts.
